zh.Gnosall, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾格諾薩爾
zh.Crawley Oxfordshire: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾可拉利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Eleanor Cowley於1298年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾時，她的父親John Cowley25歲，母親Eleanor Cowley21歲。她於大約1320年與Sir William de Burgh, 1st Baron Burgh在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1325年在英國英格蘭奧可福爾可拉利享年27歲。

zh-hans.Gnosall, Staffordshire, England: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾格諾薩爾
zh-hans.Crawley Oxfordshire: 英国英格兰奧可福爾可拉利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Eleanor Cowley于1298年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾时，她的父亲John Cowley25岁，母亲Eleanor Cowley21岁。她于大约1320年与Sir William de Burgh, 1st Baron Burgh在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1325年在英国英格兰奧可福爾可拉利享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cowley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Cowley. One in Gloucestershire is named with Old English cū ‘cow’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’; two in Derbyshire have Old English col ‘(char)coal’ as the first element; and one near London is from Old English cofa ‘shelter, bay’ (see Cove ) or the personal name Cofa. The largest group, however, with examples in Buckinghamshire, Devon, Oxfordshire, and Staffordshire, were apparently named as ‘the wood or clearing of Cufa’; however, in view of the number of places called with this element, it is possible that it conceals a topographic term as well as a personal name.
Manx: shortened form of Gaelic Mac Amhlaoibh ‘son of Amhlaoibh’ (a Gaelicized form of Old Norse Óláfr). For an alternative Manx form of the same patronymic see Callow .

variants.name: Coley
meanings: English (Midlands): nickname for a swarthy person, from Middle English coly ‘coaly, coal-black’. The original short vowel is retained in the 16th century colly ‘dirtied with coal and soot’. Alternatively, a variant of Cowley .
Probably an Americanized form of Swiss German   Kohli   or   Kohler  .

variants.name: Cove
meanings: habitational name from a place called (the) Cove, examples of which are found in Hampshire, Wilts (a minor name in Leigh), Devon, and Suffolk, all from Old English cofa, which is recorded in literary sources with the sense ‘enclosed chamber’ but in placenames probably with extended senses such as ‘shelter, hut, building’, ‘hollow’ (in the case of the Devon name), and ‘creek, inlet’ (in the case of the Suffolk name).
nickname from Middle English cof, cove ‘eager, bold, courageous’ (Old English cāf).

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Eleanor Cowley was born in 1298, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Cowley, was 25 and her mother, Eleanor Cowley, was 21. She married Sir William de Burgh, 1st Baron Burgh about 1320, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1325, in Crawley, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Eleanor Cowley est née en 1298, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Cowley, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Cowley, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William de Burgh, 1st Baron Burgh environ 1320, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1325, à Crawley, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Eleanor Cowley 1298 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Cowley 25 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Cowley 21. Sie hat um 1320 in England Sir William de Burgh, 1st Baron Burgh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1325 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Crawley, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor Cowley è nata il nel 1298 nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Cowley, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Cowley, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir William de Burgh, 1st Baron Burgh circa 1320, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1325, nel Crawley, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Cowleyが1298年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Cowleyは25歳，母Eleanor Cowleyは21歳であった。約1320年にイギリスでSir William de Burgh, 1st Baron Burghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1325年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアクラウリーで27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Cowley(이)가 1298년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Cowley(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Cowley(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1320년 영국에서 Sir William de Burgh, 1st Baron Burgh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 크롤리에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor Cowley nasceu em 1298, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Cowley, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Cowley, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William de Burgh, 1st Baron Burgh aproximadamente 1320, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1325, em Crawley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Eleanor Cowley родилась в 1298 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Cowley было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Cowley, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William de Burgh, 1st Baron Burgh около 1320 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1325 г. в местности кравли, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 27 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Eleanor Cowley nació en 1298, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Cowley, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Eleanor Cowley, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir William de Burgh, 1st Baron Burgh aproximadamente 1320, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1325, en Crawley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 27 años.
